description:
What: Refcount primitives. rc_dec enqueues drop; the park-checkpoint flushes the queue. Reuses mso_drop_all's cadence (procbin.rs precedent).

CLIF impact: rc_inc is one add (non-atomic per-process) emitted at stores into RC-arena slots.

Removes: nothing.

Tests: refcount bookkeeping under stress; assert batched drop occurs at park checkpoint, not synchronously per stmt.
title: fz-dps.B2: rc_inc / rc_dec + park-checkpoint batched drop
